name: Taiwan Name Plate Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Name Plate Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells plastic cards, name plates, and membrane switches worldwide. The company offers contactless and sharped, contact only IC, and dual interface IC cards, as well as card personalization services. It also provides embossed metal dome membrane switches, capacitive touch keypads, and printed circuit boards. Taiwan Name Plate Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
